Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Joyce Book, Respondent/Plaintiff appearing on her own behalf with witness Nicole Reid.
John C. Brown Esq., for Appellant/Defendant Zoe Leiper who is also present. Erica Reid a subpoenaed witness is also present.

This casue comes on regualry for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Joyce Book Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on her own behalf. The following documents are introduced into evidence:

Exhibit C Declaration Property Manager/Nicole Reid
Exhibit E Accounting of Owners Property & Financial Damages
Exhibit F Itemized Disposition of Security Deposit, Receipts and Check
Exhibit H Move-In/Move-Out Itemized Statements
Exhibit I Black CAA Forms
Exhibit K 9-18-13 Email
Exhibit M Photo: kitchen tile floors
ExHibit N Move in Move Out Form
Exhibit O 10-30-13 Email
Exhibit Q Copy Of Chase Money Order
Exhibit R Group of Photos 32 photos

John C. Brown counsel for Appellant/Defendant Zoe Leiper makes an offer of proof on behalf of the Appellant/Defendant. The following documents are introduced into evidence:

Exhibit 1 Chat Log

At the conclustion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: L. O'Mally Taylor; Clerk: J.Murphy; David Disbrow CSR #7768. (611)
